creator: freebsd@soulrebel.in-berlin.de
text:
I have updated KPorts to 0.8.1 and created a new shar that should solve the 
whole kdesu-issue, by wanting kdebase-runtime.

I hope I got everything else right!

If this made it in before Portsfreeze it would be awesome, but I know that you 
guys are busy...

Thanks,
Hannes
